task_completion.description: Verify that the 4 specific folders are created on the bookmark bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome bookmark bar should display the four folders: 'IRS Resources', 'State Tax Authorities', 'Professional & Standards', and 'Tax Software & Tools'.

task_completion.description: Verify that entertainment/social domains are removed from history/cookies while tax/government domains are preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome History or site data settings page showing tax-related sites but no entertainment/social sites.

task_completion.description: Verify that custom search engine shortcuts for 'irs', 'pub', and 'ssa' are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Search Engine settings page (chrome://settings/searchEngines) showing custom shortcuts for 'irs', 'pub', and 'ssa'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the homepage is set to 'https://www.irs.gov' and startup pages are set to 'irs.gov' and 'drakesoftware.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Appearance settings showing homepage as 'https://www.irs.gov' and On Startup settings showing 'irs.gov' and 'drakesoftware.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that password saving, address autofill, and payment methods are disabled, third-party cookies are blocked, Enhanced Safe Browsing is enabled, and Do Not Track is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome settings pages showing Autofill/Passwords disabled, third-party cookies blocked, Enhanced Safe Browsing selected, and Do Not Track toggled on.

task_completion.description: Verify that the default download directory is set to '/home/ga/Documents/Client_Tax_Files' and the prompt to ask where to save files is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Downloads settings page showing the location as '/home/ga/Documents/Client_Tax_Files' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' turned on.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to make these changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser window and its settings pages being interacted with, rather than a terminal or text editor modifying preferences files.

integrity.description: Verify the settings are actually applied in the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings should be visible in the standard Chrome settings interface (chrome://settings), not in a mocked HTML page or text document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just run a script to modify the SQLite databases or Preferences file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a sequence of manual navigations and clicks within the Chrome browser UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'IRS Resources', 'State Tax Authorities', 'Professional & Standards', 'Tax Software & Tools'. Expected search engine keywords: 'irs', 'pub', 'ssa'. Expected download directory: '/home/ga/Documents/Client_Tax_Files'. Expected homepage: 'irs.gov'.
